from opentelemetry import trace

tracer = trace.get_tracer(__name__)


def process_request(user_id: str, request_path: str, ip_address: str) -> None:
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("process_request") as span:
        span.set_attribute("user.hash", hash(user_id) % 10000)
        span.set_attribute("http.path_template", "/users/{id}/profile")
        span.set_attribute("client.region", get_region(ip_address))
        span.set_attribute("request.type", "api")
        do_work()


def do_work() -> None:
    pass


def get_region(ip_address: str) -> str:
    return "us-east-1"


def track_event(event_type: str, payload: dict) -> None:
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("track_event") as span:
        span.set_attribute("event.type", event_type)
        span.set_attribute("event.category", categorize_event(event_type))
        span.set_attribute("event.payload_size", len(str(payload)))


def categorize_event(event_type: str) -> str:
    return "general"
